scripts.test: npm run contract && c8 --include=tests/contract.test.mjs --exclude="" --check-coverage --statements 80 node --test tests/contract.test.mjs
scripts.test:coverage: npm run contract && c8 --include=tests/contract.test.mjs --exclude="" --reporter=text --reporter=html --check-coverage --statements 80 node --test tests/contract.test.mjs
